title: Lumpcode local configuration
description: Schema for .lumpcode/local.json — a gitignored, per-machine file that controls where and how Lumpcode runs lumps from this checkout. Created by `lumpcode project-setup`; edit it on a daemon machine (e.g. switch `mode` to "dedicated").

mode.description: How Lumpcode handles the current checkout. `shared`: this is your day-to-day clone; Lumpcode never touches it and runs in a separate copy under ~/.lumpcode/project-copies/<projectName>/. `dedicated`: this clone is owned by Lumpcode (typical daemon machine); Lumpcode pulls and runs in place, including a destructive `git reset --hard` on the target branch before each tick.

discoveryBranch.description: Singular discovery integration branch. Required when discoveryBranches is omitted. Used as the primary discovery branch (first in the effective list when discoveryBranches is also set but empty).

discoveryBranches.description: Ordered list of integration branches the dedicated daemon scans each tick. When non-empty, wins over singular discoveryBranch.

workspaceStrategy.description: How each lump run prepares git inside the preflight workspace. `checkout` (default): switch the main worktree to a fresh lump branch. `worktree`: run in a linked worktree under `.lumpcode/worktrees/<branch>/` so the main worktree stays on the lump resolved base branch.

disabled.description: When true, the background daemon (`lumpcode start`) skips every lump on this machine without stopping the scheduler. Manual `lumpcode run` is unaffected.
